title: PIR Fact (v0.1)
description: Append-only derived fact. Carries BOTH pir_level (representation abstraction) and evidence_level (warrant strength) - orthogonal axes per ADJUDICATION #4. Verdict vocabulary locked to SPEC section 4/6 per ADJUDICATION #24. Adapted from the package draft: adds measurement_interface (SPEC section 2) and the SPEC-4 verdict AMBIGUOUS; see ADR-PIR-0001.

fact_id.description: Content-addressed ID (hash of canonical JSON of content+provenance)

verdict.description: OPTIONAL. SPEC section-4/6 vocabulary ONLY. Candidate-class labels are NOT verdicts (they live on hypothesis.candidate_class).

tag.description: SOUND passes assert only what they certify (E0-E2). HEURISTIC may not assert E0; at E3/E4 must populate warnings[].

warnings.description: Located warnings (Ghidra WARNING-comment pattern). REQUIRED non-empty when analyzer.tag=HEURISTIC and evidence_level in E3/E4.

assumptions.description: Assumption IDs (taint). Invalidation traversal walks these.

measurement_interface.description: Declared measurement interface (calibration route / apparatus IDs). REQUIRED non-empty on DOMAIN and MEASUREMENT layer facts (SPEC section 2).

content.description: Fact payload. Exact rationals serialized as strings 'p/q', never floats.

witness.description: Reserved: SAT-model feasibility witness (Stage 2 symbolic bridge).

impossibility_certificate.description: Reserved: UNSAT-core-style certificate, e.g. exact negative Schur pivot.

confidence.description: Separate from similarity (BinDiff discipline). If either is set, correlator is required.
